name: hero_gensem_method
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A winding teal path with six amber glowing waypoint nodes, starting from a small human silhouette on the left and ending at a glowing diamond shape on the right. The path curves gently upward like a roadmap. Each waypoint is a circle with a subtle glow. Landscape orientation, sense of journey and progression. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 16:9 aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
